response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal audio phonetically and structurally matches the reference lyrics for 'Rolling Girl' and 'Connect'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for the song segments. For the middle portion (00:04.001 to 02:34.000), manual transcription and translation were conducted since no lyrics were present in the reference. Noticed the performers skipped 'だから怖くない もう何があっても挫けない' in 'Connect' and went straight to '振り返れば仲間がいて' from the instrumental bridge; adjusted the output accordingly. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles tightly to the spoken audio. Split sentences naturally during brief vocal pauses to prevent visual clutter and ensure semantic flow.

subtitles.english: Hold your breath, now.
Ah! Ah!
Yay!
Ciao, everyone!
Ciao, Chatini!
Hi!

subtitles.original: It's me, Raora Panthera from Hololive English...
subtitles.english: It's me, Raora Panthera from Hololive English...
...Justice-! RAWR!
Big cat means...
...big stage!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Look at this!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Look at this!
Oh!
Huh? What is this place?
Why are we here?

subtitles.original: And also, what day is it? What day is it?
subtitles.english: And also, what day is it? What day is it?

subtitles.original: Is it... is it... is it my birthday?!
subtitles.english: Is it... is it... is it my birthday?!
Yay!

subtitles.original: Thank you, everyone, for being here on this special day!
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone, for being here on this special day!

subtitles.original: I'm so happy to see everyone!
subtitles.english: I'm so happy to see everyone!
Ciao, ciao, ciao, ciao, ciao!
Hi, everyone!
And talking about my birthday,

subtitles.original: I have a special hashtag for today,
subtitles.english: I have a special hashtag for today,
which is...
#Raorabday2026!
Woo!

subtitles.original: So everyone, make sure, if you want to share some screenshots,
subtitles.english: So everyone, make sure, if you want to share some screenshots,

subtitles.original: and you want to share some comments on social media,
subtitles.english: and you want to share some comments on social media,

subtitles.original: make sure to use this hashtag! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: make sure to use this hashtag! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Oh, but maybe now we should take a look...
subtitles.english: Oh, but maybe now we should take a look...

subtitles.original: ...we should take a look at this stage! Whoa!
subtitles.english: ...we should take a look at this stage! Whoa!

subtitles.original: It's so... it's so big, isn't it?
subtitles.english: It's so... it's so big, isn't it?

subtitles.original: It's a little bit like... it looks really dreamy, like...
subtitles.english: It's a little bit like... it looks really dreamy, like...

subtitles.original: ...it seems like we are in a dream.
subtitles.english: ...it seems like we are in a dream.

subtitles.original: Maybe... maybe I'm sleeping? Maybe I'm sleeping?
subtitles.english: Maybe... maybe I'm sleeping? Maybe I'm sleeping?
Whoa, whoa.

subtitles.original: It's like... surrealism kind of thing.
subtitles.english: It's like... surrealism kind of thing.

subtitles.original: What... what is this place? Where am I?
subtitles.english: What... what is this place? Where am I?
Whoa! Whoa! Whoa!
Eh? Eh?

subtitles.original: Huh? Eh... my... my idol outfit?!
subtitles.english: Huh? Eh... my... my idol outfit?!
What? Huh?

subtitles.original: Why... why my idol outfit now?
subtitles.english: Why... why my idol outfit now?

subtitles.original: Maybe that means... I should sing more?
subtitles.english: Maybe that means... I should sing more?
Well, might as well!
So please,
listen to my songs!

subtitles.original: 交わした約束忘れないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the promise we exchanged,
I close my eyes to confirm.
I'll brush away...
...the gathered darkness and move forward.

subtitles.original: いつになったらなくした未来を...
subtitles.english: When will I be able to see...

subtitles.original: ...私ここでまた見ることできるの？
subtitles.english: ...the lost future here again?

subtitles.original: 溢れ出した不安の影を
subtitles.english: I tear through the shadows of anxiety that have overflowed,

subtitles.original: 何度でも裂いてこの世界歩んでこう
subtitles.english: again and again, I will walk through this world.
The time that was carved unceasingly
now signals the beginning.

subtitles.original: 変わらない思いをのせ
subtitles.english: With these unchanging feelings,

subtitles.original: 閉ざされた扉開けよう
subtitles.english: let's open the closed door.

subtitles.original: 目覚めた心は走り出した
subtitles.english: The awakened heart has started running,
to draw a future.

subtitles.original: 難しい道で立ち止まっても
subtitles.english: Even if I stop on a difficult path,
the sky is a beautiful blue...
...and will always be waiting for me.

subtitles.original: 振り返れば仲間がいて
subtitles.english: If I look back, I have friends,

subtitles.original: 気がつけば優しく包まれてた
subtitles.english: and realized I was being gently wrapped up.

subtitles.original: 何もかもが歪んだ世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where everything is distorted,

subtitles.original: 唯一信じれるここが救いだった
subtitles.english: this place I can believe in was my only salvation.

subtitles.original: 喜びも悲しみもわけあえば
subtitles.english: If we share both joy and sadness,
these feelings will become stronger.
If this voice reaches you...
